questions.question_zh: 问题 1：如何定义应用程序的恢复目标？（目标包括但不限于：恢复点目标 (RPO)、恢复时间目标 (RTO)、平均恢复时间 (MTTR)
questions.question_en: How do you define recovery objectives for your application? (Including RPO, RTO, MTTR)
questions.why_important: 恢复目标是所有韧性投资决策的基础，直接影响架构设计和资源分配

options.description_zh: 未定义或未正式记录恢复目标
options.description_en: Recovery objectives not defined or documented

options.description_zh: 已定义恢复目标，但未定期审查或验证
options.description_en: Recovery objectives defined but not regularly reviewed

options.description_zh: 已定义明确的恢复目标（RTO<15分钟，RPO接近零），定期测试和验证，并与业务SLA对齐
options.description_en: Clear recovery objectives defined (RTO<15min, near-zero RPO), regularly tested and aligned with business SLAs

questions.aws_best_practice: 根据业务影响分析确定每个应用程序的 RTO 和 RPO。对于关键任务应用，建议 RTO 15分钟，RPO 接近零。使用 AWS Resilience Hub 自动评估和跟踪恢复目标。
questions.why_important_en: Recovery objectives are the foundation for all resilience investment decisions, directly impacting architecture design and resource allocation
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Determine RTO and RPO for each application based on Business Impact Analysis. For mission-critical applications, recommend RTO of 15 minutes and near-zero RPO. Use AWS Resilience Hub to automatically assess and track recovery objectives.

questions.question_zh: 问题 2：如何为应用程序定义正常运行时间和延迟的服务级别目标 (SLO)？
questions.question_en: How do you define Service Level Objectives (SLOs) for uptime and latency?
questions.why_important: SLO是衡量服务质量的核心指标，用于错误预算管理和优先级决策

options.description_zh: 未定义SLO或仅有模糊的可用性目标
options.description_en: No SLOs defined or only vague availability targets

options.description_zh: 定义了基本的SLO（如99.9%可用性），但未定期审查或调整
options.description_en: Basic SLOs defined (e.g., 99.9% availability) but not regularly reviewed

options.description_zh: 定义了详细的SLO（正常运行时间99.99%，延迟<100ms），与RTO/RPO对齐，定期审查并基于实际性能数据调整
options.description_en: Detailed SLOs defined (99.99% uptime, <100ms latency), aligned with RTO/RPO, regularly reviewed based on actual performance

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 Google SRE 方法定义 SLI/SLO。关键任务应用建议 99.99% 正常运行时间，P95 延迟 <100ms。使用 CloudWatch 跟踪 SLI，并设置错误预算策略。
questions.why_important_en: SLOs are core metrics for measuring service quality, used for error budget management and prioritization decisions
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use Google SRE methodology to define SLIs/SLOs. For mission-critical applications, recommend 99.99% uptime and P95 latency <100ms. Use CloudWatch to track SLIs and implement error budget policies.

questions.question_zh: 问题 3：如何确定或衡量应用程序的关键程度？
questions.question_en: How do you determine or measure application criticality?
questions.why_important: 关键程度决定韧性投资的优先级和资源分配

options.description_zh: 未正式评估应用程序关键性
options.description_en: Application criticality not formally assessed

options.description_zh: 基于主观判断或单一维度（如收入）评估关键性
options.description_en: Criticality assessed based on subjective judgment or single dimension (e.g., revenue)

options.description_zh: 基于多维度评估关键性（业务影响、财务成本、合规要求、客户影响），有明确的分类标准和文档
options.description_en: Multi-dimensional criticality assessment (business impact, financial cost, compliance, customer impact) with clear classification criteria and documentation

questions.aws_best_practice: 评估应用程序关键性需考虑：停机时间成本、风险级别、战略重要性、基础设施成本。使用业务影响分析（BIA）方法，将应用分为关键任务、重要和非关键三类。
questions.why_important_en: Criticality level determines the priority of resilience investments and resource allocation
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Assess application criticality considering: downtime cost, risk level, strategic importance, infrastructure cost. Use Business Impact Analysis (BIA) methodology to classify applications as mission-critical, important, or non-critical.

questions.question_zh: 问题 4：记录在案的韧性要求限制有哪些？
questions.question_en: What are the documented constraints on resilience requirements?
questions.why_important: 明确的韧性要求限制确保韧性投资与业务需求对齐

options.description_zh: 未记录或未定义韧性要求的限制条件
options.description_en: No documented or defined limits on resilience requirements

options.description_zh: 有基本的限制说明，但不全面或未与利益相关者对齐
options.description_en: Basic limit statements exist but not comprehensive or not aligned with stakeholders

options.description_zh: 详细记录韧性要求限制：成本约束、技术限制、业务容忍度、监管要求，并定期审查
options.description_en: Detailed documentation of resilience requirement limits: cost constraints, technical limitations, business tolerance, regulatory requirements, regularly reviewed

questions.aws_best_practice: 明确定义韧性投资边界：最大可接受的RTO/RPO、成本预算上限、技术债务容忍度。使用业务影响分析（BIA）确定优先级。记录在架构决策记录（ADR）中，并与业务利益相关者定期审查。
questions.why_important_en: Clear resilience requirement constraints ensure resilience investments align with business needs
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Clearly define resilience investment boundaries: maximum acceptable RTO/RPO, cost budget caps, tech debt tolerance. Use BIA to determine priorities. Document in Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) and regularly review with business stakeholders.

questions.question_zh: 问题 5：如何考虑可能性、影响和成本选择控制措施？
questions.question_en: How do you consider likelihood, impact, and cost when selecting controls?
questions.why_important: 基于风险的决策确保韧性投资的ROI最大化

options.description_zh: 未系统性考虑可能性、影响和成本进行决策
options.description_en: No systematic consideration of likelihood, impact, and cost in decisions

options.description_zh: 有基本的风险评估，但缺少定量分析或成本效益分析
options.description_en: Basic risk assessment exists but lacking quantitative analysis or cost-benefit analysis

options.description_zh: 系统化的风险评估框架：定量分析故障可能性、影响评估、成本效益分析、优先级矩阵
options.description_en: Systematic risk assessment framework: quantitative failure likelihood analysis, impact assessment, cost-benefit analysis, prioritization matrix

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用风险矩阵评估控制措施：横轴=可能性（罕见/偶尔/频繁），纵轴=影响（低/中/高/关键）。计算年度损失期望（ALE）。优先投资高影响高可能性的风险。使用 AWS Well-Architected Tool 进行风险评估。
questions.why_important_en: Risk-based decision-making ensures maximum ROI on resilience investments
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use a risk matrix to evaluate controls: x-axis = likelihood (rare/occasional/frequent), y-axis = impact (low/medium/high/critical). Calculate Annualized Loss Expectancy (ALE). Prioritize investment in high-impact, high-likelihood risks. Use AWS Well-Architected Tool for risk assessment.

questions.question_zh: 问题 6：如何确保韧性学习优先于新功能？
questions.question_en: How do you ensure resilience learning is prioritized over new features?
questions.why_important: 平衡韧性学习与新功能开发确保长期系统健康

options.description_zh: 韧性学习总是让位于新功能开发
options.description_en: Resilience learning always gives way to new feature development

options.description_zh: 偶尔投入时间进行韧性学习，但不系统
options.description_en: Occasionally invest time in resilience learning but not systematic

options.description_zh: 系统化的韧性投资：固定百分比时间（如20%）、专门的韧性冲刺、技术债务管理
options.description_en: Systematic resilience investment: fixed percentage of time (e.g., 20%), dedicated resilience sprints, tech debt management

questions.aws_best_practice: 采用Google的20%时间或亚马逊的20%规则用于韧性改进。将韧性工作纳入sprint计划。使用错误预算政策：SLO耗尽时暂停新功能。建立技术债务注册表并定期偿还。韧性是特性而非技术债。
questions.why_important_en: Balancing resilience learning with new feature development ensures long-term system health
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Adopt Google's 20% time or Amazon's 20% rule for resilience improvement. Include resilience work in sprint planning. Use error budget policy: pause new features when SLO is exhausted. Establish a tech debt registry and regularly pay it down. Resilience is a feature, not tech debt.

questions.question_zh: 问题 7：依赖关系文档有多全面？
questions.question_en: How comprehensive is your dependency documentation?
questions.why_important: 完整的依赖关系文档是故障分析和恢复规划的基础

options.description_zh: 依赖关系未记录或仅有部分关键依赖
options.description_en: Dependencies not documented or only partial critical dependencies

options.description_zh: 有基本的依赖关系文档，但缺少版本信息、SLA或故障模式
options.description_en: Basic dependency documentation exists but lacking version info, SLAs or failure modes

options.description_zh: 完整的依赖关系文档：所有内外部依赖、版本、SLA、故障模式、降级策略、定期更新
options.description_en: Complete dependency documentation: all internal/external dependencies, versions, SLAs, failure modes, degradation strategies, regularly updated

questions.aws_best_practice: 维护依赖关系清单包含：服务名称、版本、所有者、SLA、硬/软依赖分类、故障影响、降级策略。使用 CloudWatch ServiceLens 自动生成服务地图。在架构图中标注依赖关系。定期审查依赖健康度。
questions.why_important_en: Comprehensive dependency documentation is the foundation for failure analysis and recovery planning
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Maintain a dependency inventory including: service name, version, owner, SLA, hard/soft dependency classification, failure impact, degradation strategy. Use CloudWatch ServiceLens to auto-generate service maps. Annotate dependencies in architecture diagrams. Regularly review dependency health.

questions.question_zh: 问题 8：如何解决与依赖关系的耦合问题？
questions.question_en: How do you address coupling with dependencies?
questions.why_important: 管理耦合度降低级联故障风险

options.description_zh: 未识别或管理依赖关系的耦合问题
options.description_en: Coupling with dependencies not identified or managed

options.description_zh: 识别了耦合问题，但缺少系统性的解耦策略
options.description_en: Coupling issues identified but lacking systematic decoupling strategies

options.description_zh: 主动管理耦合：使用队列/事件解耦、异步通信、断路器、缓存、超时策略
options.description_en: Proactive coupling management: queues/events for decoupling, async communication, circuit breakers, caching, timeout strategies

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用松耦合架构模式：1) SQS/SNS异步消息；2) EventBridge事件驱动；3) API Gateway缓存；4) Lambda异步调用；5) Step Functions编排。实施断路器模式（App Mesh）。避免分布式事务。
questions.why_important_en: Managing coupling reduces the risk of cascading failures
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use loose coupling architecture patterns: 1) SQS/SNS async messaging; 2) EventBridge event-driven; 3) API Gateway caching; 4) Lambda async invocation; 5) Step Functions orchestration. Implement circuit breaker pattern (App Mesh). Avoid distributed transactions.

questions.question_zh: 问题 9：如何创建和利用清单？
questions.question_en: How do you create and leverage inventories?
questions.why_important: 清单是变更管理和一致性验证的基础

options.description_zh: 无系统的资源清单或依赖人工记忆
options.description_en: No systematic resource inventory or relying on human memory

options.description_zh: 有基本清单，但不完整或更新不及时
options.description_en: Basic inventory exists but incomplete or not kept up-to-date

options.description_zh: 自动化的资源清单：所有基础设施、应用、配置，自动发现和更新，与CMDB集成
options.description_en: Automated resource inventory: all infrastructure, applications, configurations, auto-discovery and updates, CMDB integration

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 AWS Config 自动跟踪所有资源配置。使用 Systems Manager Inventory 收集实例信息。使用 Resource Groups 和标签策略组织资源。集成 Service Catalog 管理批准的配置。定期审计清单完整性。
questions.why_important_en: Inventories are the foundation for change management and consistency verification
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use AWS Config to automatically track all resource configurations. Use Systems Manager Inventory to collect instance information. Use Resource Groups and tagging strategies to organize resources. Integrate Service Catalog to manage approved configurations. Regularly audit inventory completeness.

questions.question_zh: 问题 10：使用哪种方法对故障情景进行建模？
questions.question_en: What methods do you use to model failure scenarios?
questions.why_important: 故障场景建模帮助识别单点故障和设计缓解措施

options.description_zh: 未进行故障场景建模或仅凭经验判断
options.description_en: No failure scenario modeling or only experience-based judgment

options.description_zh: 有基本的故障模式分析（FMEA），但覆盖不全或未定期更新
options.description_en: Basic FMEA exists but incomplete coverage or not regularly updated

options.description_zh: 系统化的故障建模：FMEA、故障树分析（FTA）、场景测试、持续更新
options.description_en: Systematic failure modeling: FMEA, Fault Tree Analysis (FTA), scenario testing, continuous updates

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 FMEA 方法：识别故障模式、评估影响和可能性、确定检测方法、设计缓解措施。使用 AWS FIS (Fault Injection Simulator) 验证故障场景。使用 Resilience Hub 自动化故障场景分析。
questions.why_important_en: Failure scenario modeling helps identify single points of failure and design mitigations
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use FMEA methodology: identify failure modes, assess impact and likelihood, determine detection methods, design mitigations. Use AWS FIS (Fault Injection Simulator) to validate failure scenarios. Use Resilience Hub to automate failure scenario analysis.

questions.question_zh: 问题 11：如何预测应用程序在高负载条件下的性能？
questions.question_en: How do you forecast application performance under high-load conditions?
questions.why_important: 容量预测确保系统能够应对高负载而不影响可用性

options.description_zh: 未进行容量预测或仅基于经验估计
options.description_en: No capacity forecasting or only experience-based estimation

options.description_zh: 有基本的负载测试，但不代表生产环境或未测试峰值场景
options.description_en: Basic load testing exists but not representative of production or peak scenarios not tested

options.description_zh: 全面的容量规划：生产级负载测试、压力测试、峰值场景测试、自动化性能监控
options.description_en: Comprehensive capacity planning: production-grade load testing, stress testing, peak scenario testing, automated performance monitoring

questions.aws_best_practice: 进行定期负载测试：使用与生产相同的配置。测试场景包括：正常负载、峰值负载（2-3x）、压力测试（直到失败）。使用 CloudWatch 跟踪资源利用率趋势。实施自动扩展策略。
questions.why_important_en: Capacity forecasting ensures the system can handle high loads without impacting availability
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Conduct regular load testing using production-identical configurations. Test scenarios include: normal load, peak load (2-3x), stress testing (until failure). Use CloudWatch to track resource utilization trends. Implement auto-scaling strategies.

questions.question_zh: 问题 12：如何准备应用程序以处理负载变化？
questions.question_en: How do you prepare your application to handle load changes?
questions.why_important: 应对负载变化的能力是可用性和成本效率的关键

options.description_zh: 无自动扩展能力或完全依赖手动干预
options.description_en: No auto-scaling capability or fully relying on manual intervention

options.description_zh: 有基本的自动扩展，但扩展速度慢或缺少预测性扩展
options.description_en: Basic auto-scaling exists but slow scaling or lacking predictive scaling

options.description_zh: 先进的负载管理：预测性扩展、多层扩展策略、快速扩展能力、负载测试验证
options.description_en: Advanced load management: predictive scaling, multi-tier scaling strategies, rapid scaling capability, load test validation

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 Auto Scaling：目标跟踪扩展策略（CPU/内存/请求数）。实施预测性扩展（基于CloudWatch历史数据）。设置最小容量确保基线可用性。使用 Application Auto Scaling 扩展多种资源（ECS、DynamoDB等）。
questions.why_important_en: The ability to handle load changes is critical for availability and cost efficiency
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use Auto Scaling: target tracking scaling policies (CPU/memory/request count). Implement predictive scaling (based on CloudWatch historical data). Set minimum capacity to ensure baseline availability. Use Application Auto Scaling to scale multiple resources (ECS, DynamoDB, etc.).

questions.question_zh: 问题 13：如何为应用程序建立指标（日志、指标、跟踪、警报）？
questions.question_en: How do you establish instrumentation (logs, metrics, traces, alerts) for your application?
questions.why_important: 完整的可观察性是快速检测和诊断问题的基础

options.description_zh: 仅有基础日志，无结构化指标或跟踪
options.description_en: Only basic logging, no structured metrics or tracing

options.description_zh: 有日志和基本指标，但缺少分布式跟踪或综合告警
options.description_en: Have logs and basic metrics, but missing distributed tracing or comprehensive alerting

options.description_zh: 完整的可观察性：结构化日志、CloudWatch指标、X-Ray跟踪、主动告警，全部集成
options.description_en: Complete observability: structured logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing, proactive alerting, all integrated

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立三大支柱：日志（CloudWatch Logs）、指标（CloudWatch Metrics）、跟踪（AWS X-Ray）。使用统一的命名规范和标签策略。设置金字塔告警模型：症状告警（用户影响）> 原因告警（根本原因）。
questions.why_important_en: Complete observability is the foundation for rapid problem detection and diagnosis
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish three pillars: Logs (CloudWatch Logs), Metrics (CloudWatch Metrics), Traces (AWS X-Ray). Use unified naming conventions and tagging strategies. Set up pyramid alerting model: symptom alerts (user impact) > cause alerts (root cause).

questions.question_zh: 问题 14：如何确保日志可访问且功能正常？
questions.question_en: How do you ensure logs are accessible and functional?
questions.why_important: 日志是故障排查的关键依据，必须保证可用性

options.description_zh: 日志存储在本地，无中央化管理或可能在故障时丢失
options.description_en: Logs stored locally, no centralization or may be lost during failures

options.description_zh: 集中化日志，但缺少访问控制、检索能力有限或保留期不足
options.description_en: Centralized logs but lacking access controls, limited search capability or insufficient retention

options.description_zh: 中央化日志系统（CloudWatch Logs Insights），有适当保留期、访问控制、快速检索、备份策略
options.description_en: Centralized log system (CloudWatch Logs Insights) with appropriate retention, access controls, fast search, backup strategy

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CloudWatch Logs 集中管理日志，配置适当的保留期（生产日志建议30-90天）。使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 进行快速查询。关键日志导出到 S3 长期存档。实施日志完整性验证。
questions.why_important_en: Logs are critical evidence for troubleshooting and must be reliably available
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CloudWatch Logs for centralized log management with appropriate retention periods (30-90 days recommended for production logs). Use CloudWatch Logs Insights for fast querying. Export critical logs to S3 for long-term archival. Implement log integrity validation.

questions.question_zh: 问题 15：如何设置从日志中检索数据？
questions.question_en: How do you set up data retrieval from logs?
questions.why_important: 高效的日志检索能力加快故障排查速度

options.description_zh: 日志检索困难，依赖手动搜索或命令行工具
options.description_en: Difficult log retrieval, relying on manual search or CLI tools

options.description_zh: 有集中化日志查询，但查询语法复杂或性能较慢
options.description_en: Centralized log querying exists but complex syntax or slow performance

options.description_zh: 高效的日志检索：CloudWatch Logs Insights、保存的查询模板、快速全文搜索、可视化仪表板
options.description_en: Efficient log retrieval: CloudWatch Logs Insights, saved query templates, fast full-text search, visualization dashboards

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 进行结构化查询。创建常用查询模板（如错误统计、慢请求）。使用字段提取和聚合。集成 CloudWatch Dashboards 可视化。考虑 OpenSearch 用于复杂分析。
questions.why_important_en: Efficient log retrieval capability accelerates troubleshooting
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CloudWatch Logs Insights for structured queries. Create common query templates (e.g., error statistics, slow requests). Use field extraction and aggregation. Integrate with CloudWatch Dashboards for visualization. Consider OpenSearch for complex analysis.

questions.question_zh: 问题 16：如何利用跟踪从应用程序中提取数据？
questions.question_en: How do you leverage tracing to extract data from your application?
questions.why_important: 分布式跟踪是诊断微服务架构性能问题的关键工具

options.description_zh: 未实施分布式跟踪
options.description_en: No distributed tracing implemented

options.description_zh: 部分服务启用跟踪，但覆盖不完整或缺少关键事务跟踪
options.description_en: Partial tracing enabled but incomplete coverage or missing critical transaction tracing

options.description_zh: 完整的分布式跟踪（X-Ray），覆盖所有服务和外部依赖，包含自定义注释和性能分析
options.description_en: Complete distributed tracing (X-Ray) covering all services and external dependencies, with custom annotations and performance profiling

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 AWS X-Ray 实施端到端跟踪。为关键事务添加自定义段和注释。集成 X-Ray 与 CloudWatch ServiceLens 获得完整的服务地图。设置跟踪采样率（生产建议5-10%采样）。
questions.why_important_en: Distributed tracing is a key tool for diagnosing performance issues in microservice architectures
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Implement end-to-end tracing with AWS X-Ray. Add custom segments and annotations for critical transactions. Integrate X-Ray with CloudWatch ServiceLens for complete service maps. Set tracing sampling rate (5-10% recommended for production).

questions.question_zh: 问题 17：如何使用合成流量监控应用程序？
questions.question_en: How do you use synthetic traffic to monitor your application?
questions.why_important: 合成监控提供主动的用户体验监控

options.description_zh: 无合成监控，仅依赖真实用户监控或告警
options.description_en: No synthetic monitoring, only relying on real user monitoring or alerts

options.description_zh: 有基本的健康检查，但不模拟真实用户行为
options.description_en: Basic health checks exist but not simulating real user behavior

options.description_zh: 完整的合成监控：模拟关键用户路径、多地域监控、可视化用户体验、性能基线
options.description_en: Complete synthetic monitoring: simulate critical user paths, multi-region monitoring, visualized user experience, performance baselines

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CloudWatch Synthetics 创建 Canary 脚本模拟用户交互。监控关键路径（登录、购买、搜索）。从多个地域运行。设置延迟和可用性告警。使用 Puppeteer 或 Selenium 编写复杂场景。
questions.why_important_en: Synthetic monitoring provides proactive user experience monitoring
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CloudWatch Synthetics to create Canary scripts simulating user interactions. Monitor critical paths (login, purchase, search). Run from multiple regions. Set latency and availability alerts. Use Puppeteer or Selenium for complex scenarios.

questions.question_zh: 问题 18：如何将指标与故障域保持一致？
questions.question_en: How do you align metrics with fault domains?
questions.why_important: 按故障域分组的指标有助于快速隔离问题范围

options.description_zh: 指标未按故障域（AZ、Region、服务）分组
options.description_en: Metrics not grouped by fault domains (AZ, Region, Service)

options.description_zh: 部分指标按故障域分组，但不完整或缺少跨域对比
options.description_en: Partial metrics grouped by fault domains but incomplete or missing cross-domain comparison

options.description_zh: 所有关键指标按故障域（AZ/Region/Cell）分组，有自动化的异常检测和对比分析
options.description_en: All critical metrics grouped by fault domains (AZ/Region/Cell) with automated anomaly detection and comparative analysis

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CloudWatch 维度按 AZ、Region、InstanceId 分组指标。设置跨AZ对比告警以检测部分故障。对于单元化架构，按Cell分组指标。使用 CloudWatch Anomaly Detection 自动识别异常。
questions.why_important_en: Metrics grouped by fault domain help quickly isolate the scope of issues
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CloudWatch dimensions to group metrics by AZ, Region, InstanceId. Set cross-AZ comparison alerts to detect partial failures. For cell-based architectures, group metrics by Cell. Use CloudWatch Anomaly Detection to automatically identify anomalies.

questions.question_zh: 问题 19：如何跟踪可用性和延迟指标？
questions.question_en: How do you track availability and latency metrics?
questions.why_important: 可用性和延迟是SLO的核心指标，必须持续监控

options.description_zh: 未系统性跟踪可用性或延迟，或仅依赖基础设施指标
options.description_en: No systematic tracking of availability or latency, or only relying on infrastructure metrics

options.description_zh: 跟踪基本的可用性和延迟，但未按用户体验或关键路径分组
options.description_en: Track basic availability and latency but not grouped by user experience or critical paths

options.description_zh: 完整跟踪：按API/用户路径的可用性和多个百分位延迟（P50/P95/P99），对比SLO目标
options.description_en: Complete tracking: availability and multi-percentile latency (P50/P95/P99) by API/user paths, compared against SLO targets

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CloudWatch Synthetics 进行合成监控，模拟真实用户交互。跟踪错误率（4xx/5xx）和延迟百分位数。使用 CloudWatch SLI/SLO 功能跟踪错误预算。对关键API设置<100ms P95延迟告警。
questions.why_important_en: Availability and latency are core SLO metrics that must be continuously monitored
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CloudWatch Synthetics for synthetic monitoring simulating real user interactions. Track error rates (4xx/5xx) and latency percentiles. Use CloudWatch SLI/SLO features to track error budgets. Set <100ms P95 latency alerts for critical APIs.

questions.question_zh: 问题 20：指标在哪些领域提供报告？
questions.question_en: In what areas do metrics provide reporting?
questions.why_important: 全面的指标报告提供完整的系统洞察

options.description_zh: 指标报告零散，缺少统一视图
options.description_en: Scattered metric reporting, lacking unified view

options.description_zh: 有基本的仪表板，但未涵盖所有关键领域
options.description_en: Basic dashboards exist but not covering all critical areas

options.description_zh: 全面的指标报告：应用、基础设施、业务指标，按团队/服务/环境组织，实时更新
options.description_en: Comprehensive metric reporting: application, infrastructure, business metrics, organized by team/service/environment, real-time updates

questions.aws_best_practice: 创建层次化仪表板：1) 高层次：业务指标和SLO；2) 服务级：服务健康和依赖；3) 资源级：基础设施指标。使用 CloudWatch Dashboards 和 Grafana。按团队和服务组织。包含故障分析视图。
questions.why_important_en: Comprehensive metric reporting provides complete system insights
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Create hierarchical dashboards: 1) High-level: business metrics and SLOs; 2) Service-level: service health and dependencies; 3) Resource-level: infrastructure metrics. Use CloudWatch Dashboards and Grafana. Organize by team and service. Include failure analysis views.

questions.question_zh: 问题 21：如何跟踪依赖关系并在依赖关系受威胁时发出警报？
questions.question_en: How do you track dependencies and alert when dependencies are at risk?
questions.why_important: 依赖关系故障是导致级联故障的常见原因

options.description_zh: 未系统性跟踪依赖关系健康状况
options.description_en: No systematic tracking of dependency health

options.description_zh: 跟踪部分关键依赖，但缺少完整的依赖地图或主动告警
options.description_en: Track some critical dependencies but lacking complete dependency map or proactive alerting

options.description_zh: 完整的依赖关系监控：服务地图、健康检查、延迟/错误率告警、依赖降级策略
options.description_en: Complete dependency monitoring: service map, health checks, latency/error rate alerts, dependency degradation strategies

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CloudWatch ServiceLens 可视化服务依赖关系。为每个依赖设置健康检查（Route 53 Health Checks）。跟踪依赖的延迟和错误率。实施断路器模式（AWS App Mesh）以防止级联故障。
questions.why_important_en: Dependency failures are a common cause of cascading failures
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CloudWatch ServiceLens to visualize service dependencies. Set health checks for each dependency (Route 53 Health Checks). Track dependency latency and error rates. Implement circuit breaker pattern (AWS App Mesh) to prevent cascading failures.

questions.question_zh: 问题 22：指标何时提供有关故障场景的信息？
questions.question_en: When do metrics provide information about failure scenarios?
questions.why_important: 故障场景指标帮助快速诊断和隔离问题

options.description_zh: 指标仅显示正常状态，故障时缺少诊断信息
options.description_en: Metrics only show normal state, lacking diagnostic info during failures

options.description_zh: 有错误率指标，但缺少详细的故障模式分类
options.description_en: Error rate metrics exist but lacking detailed failure mode classification

options.description_zh: 详细的故障指标：按错误类型、依赖、影响范围分类，关联日志和跟踪
options.description_en: Detailed failure metrics: classified by error type, dependency, impact scope, correlated with logs and traces

questions.aws_best_practice: 跟踪多维度故障指标：错误类型（4xx/5xx/超时/依赖）、受影响API、用户影响百分比。使用 CloudWatch Contributor Insights 识别top错误。关联X-Ray跟踪分析根本原因。
questions.why_important_en: Failure scenario metrics help rapidly diagnose and isolate problems
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Track multi-dimensional failure metrics: error types (4xx/5xx/timeout/dependency), affected APIs, user impact percentage. Use CloudWatch Contributor Insights to identify top errors. Correlate with X-Ray traces for root cause analysis.

questions.question_zh: 问题 23：选择警报的策略是什么？
questions.question_en: What is the strategy for selecting alerts?
questions.why_important: 告警策略确保及时发现问题而不产生告警疲劳

options.description_zh: 告警策略不清晰，产生大量噪音或遗漏关键告警
options.description_en: Unclear alerting strategy, generating noise or missing critical alerts

options.description_zh: 有基本的告警规则，但未区分严重程度或缺少升级路径
options.description_en: Basic alert rules exist but not distinguishing severity or lacking escalation paths

options.description_zh: 完善的告警策略：症状导向、严重程度分级、降噪机制、智能聚合、可操作性
options.description_en: Comprehensive alerting strategy: symptom-oriented, severity classification, noise reduction, intelligent aggregation, actionable

questions.aws_best_practice: 遵循告警最佳实践：1) 基于症状而非原因；2) 分级（P0-P3）；3) 可操作性（每个告警有runbook）；4) 避免告警风暴（聚合）；5) 定期审查和优化。使用 CloudWatch Composite Alarms 减少噪音。
questions.why_important_en: Alert strategy ensures timely problem detection without alert fatigue
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Follow alerting best practices: 1) Symptom-based, not cause-based; 2) Severity classification (P0-P3); 3) Actionable (each alert has a runbook); 4) Avoid alert storms (aggregation); 5) Regular review and optimization. Use CloudWatch Composite Alarms to reduce noise.

questions.question_zh: 问题 24：警报阈值的适应性如何？
questions.question_en: How adaptive are alert thresholds?
questions.why_important: 自适应阈值减少误报并适应系统变化

options.description_zh: 告警阈值固定，经常产生误报或漏报
options.description_en: Fixed alert thresholds, frequently generating false positives or misses

options.description_zh: 手动调整阈值，但调整频率低或依赖经验
options.description_en: Manual threshold adjustments but infrequent or experience-based

options.description_zh: 自适应阈值：基于历史数据、机器学习、自动调整、季节性模式识别
options.description_en: Adaptive thresholds: based on historical data, machine learning, automatic adjustment, seasonal pattern recognition

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CloudWatch Anomaly Detection 自动学习指标模式并生成动态阈值。考虑时间因素（工作日vs周末、白天vs夜间）。使用百分位数而非平均值。定期review告警质量（准确率、误报率）。
questions.why_important_en: Adaptive thresholds reduce false positives and adapt to system changes
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CloudWatch Anomaly Detection to automatically learn metric patterns and generate dynamic thresholds. Consider time factors (weekdays vs. weekends, day vs. night). Use percentiles rather than averages. Regularly review alert quality (accuracy, false positive rate).

questions.question_zh: 问题 25：使用什么方法来中继警报通知？
questions.question_en: What methods are used to relay alert notifications?
questions.why_important: 多渠道告警确保关键告警能够送达

options.description_zh: 单一告警渠道，存在单点故障风险
options.description_en: Single alert channel, single point of failure risk

options.description_zh: 多个告警渠道，但未根据严重程度区分
options.description_en: Multiple alert channels but not differentiated by severity

options.description_zh: 智能告警路由：根据严重程度、时间、on-call轮值自动路由，多渠道备份
options.description_en: Intelligent alert routing: automatic routing based on severity, time, on-call rotation, multi-channel backup

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 SNS 实现多渠道通知：邮件、SMS、Slack/Teams、PagerDuty。根据告警级别路由（P0→SMS+电话，P1→Slack，P2→邮件）。使用 EventBridge 实现复杂路由逻辑。确保关键告警有备用通道。
questions.why_important_en: Multi-channel alerting ensures critical alerts are delivered
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use SNS for multi-channel notifications: email, SMS, Slack/Teams, PagerDuty. Route by alert level (P0 -> SMS+phone, P1 -> Slack, P2 -> email). Use EventBridge for complex routing logic. Ensure critical alerts have backup channels.

questions.question_zh: 问题 26：如何自动响应警报？
questions.question_en: How do you automate alert responses?
questions.why_important: 自动响应减少MTTR并降低人为错误

options.description_zh: 所有告警需要人工响应
options.description_en: All alerts require manual response

options.description_zh: 部分告警有自动响应，但覆盖有限
options.description_en: Some alerts have auto-response but limited coverage

options.description_zh: 广泛的自动响应：自动扩展、自动重启、自动隔离、自动回滚、人工确认后执行
options.description_en: Extensive auto-response: auto-scaling, auto-restart, auto-isolation, auto-rollback, execute after human confirmation

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 Systems Manager Automation 实现自动响应。常见场景：1) 高CPU→自动扩展；2) 实例不健康→自动替换；3) 磁盘满→自动清理；4) 错误率高→自动回滚。使用 Lambda 实现自定义响应逻辑。
questions.why_important_en: Automated response reduces MTTR and lowers human error
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use Systems Manager Automation for auto-response. Common scenarios: 1) High CPU -> auto-scale; 2) Unhealthy instance -> auto-replace; 3) Disk full -> auto-cleanup; 4) High error rate -> auto-rollback. Use Lambda for custom response logic.

questions.question_zh: 问题 27：您使用什么标准来选择应用程序的灾难恢复策略？
questions.question_en: What criteria do you use to select disaster recovery strategy for your application?
questions.why_important: DR策略直接决定RTO/RPO能否满足业务要求

options.description_zh: DR 策略由企业规定
options.description_en: DR strategies are prescribed by the business

options.description_zh: DR 策略由应用程序团队制定
options.description_en: DR strategies are developed by the application team

options.description_zh: DR 策略由应用程序团队针对特定场景制定
options.description_en: DR strategies are developed by the application team for specific scenarios

questions.aws_best_practice: DR策略应与RTO/RPO对齐。AWS提供4种策略：备份和恢复（小时级RTO）、导航灯（分钟级RTO）、温备用（秒级RTO）、主动-主动（无RTO）。使用 AWS Resilience Hub 评估并推荐合适的策略。
questions.why_important_en: DR strategy directly determines whether RTO/RPO can meet business requirements
questions.aws_best_practice_en: DR strategy should align with RTO/RPO. AWS offers 4 strategies: Backup & Restore (hours RTO), Pilot Light (minutes RTO), Warm Standby (seconds RTO), Active-Active (zero RTO). Use AWS Resilience Hub to assess and recommend the appropriate strategy.

questions.question_zh: 问题 28：事故发生期间的通信协议是什么？
questions.question_en: What is the communication protocol during incidents?
questions.why_important: 清晰的通信协议确保事故期间的有效协作

options.description_zh: 无正式的通信协议或临时决定
options.description_en: No formal communication protocol or ad-hoc decisions

options.description_zh: 有基本的通信渠道，但未明确角色职责或通信频率
options.description_en: Basic communication channels exist but roles and communication frequency not clearly defined

options.description_zh: 详细的通信协议：指定渠道（Slack/Teams）、角色职责、更新频率、升级路径、客户沟通模板
options.description_en: Detailed communication protocol: designated channels (Slack/Teams), role responsibilities, update frequency, escalation paths, customer communication templates

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立专用的事件响应频道（如Slack war room）。定义角色：事件指挥官、技术负责人、通信负责人。使用 AWS Chatbot 集成 CloudWatch 告警到 Slack/Teams。准备客户通信模板。
questions.why_important_en: Clear communication protocols ensure effective collaboration during incidents
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish dedicated incident response channels (e.g., Slack war room). Define roles: incident commander, technical lead, communications lead. Use AWS Chatbot to integrate CloudWatch alerts into Slack/Teams. Prepare customer communication templates.

questions.question_zh: 问题 29：数据恢复是否自动化？
questions.question_en: Is data recovery automated?
questions.why_important: 自动化恢复减少RTO并降低人为错误

options.description_zh: 数据恢复完全手动，依赖人工操作
options.description_en: Data recovery fully manual, relying on human operations

options.description_zh: 部分自动化（如自动备份），但恢复过程需要手动触发和验证
options.description_en: Partially automated (e.g., automatic backups) but recovery process requires manual triggering and validation

options.description_zh: 完全自动化：自动备份、一键或自动触发恢复、自动验证数据完整性
options.description_en: Fully automated: automatic backups, one-click or auto-triggered recovery, automated data integrity validation

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 AWS Backup 统一管理备份策略。配置自动快照（RDS/EBS）和跨区域复制。使用 AWS Lambda 自动化恢复流程。实施 Infrastructure as Code (CloudFormation/Terraform) 实现快速重建。
questions.why_important_en: Automated recovery reduces RTO and lowers human error
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use AWS Backup for unified backup policy management. Configure automatic snapshots (RDS/EBS) and cross-region replication. Use AWS Lambda to automate recovery processes. Implement Infrastructure as Code (CloudFormation/Terraform) for rapid rebuilds.

questions.question_zh: 问题 30：您使用什么方法来验证您的数据恢复策略，以确保它们符合您的 RPO 和 RTO 目标？
questions.question_en: What methods do you use to validate data recovery strategies meet RPO and RTO goals?
questions.why_important: 未经测试的DR计划等于没有DR计划

options.description_zh: 未测试数据恢复策略
options.description_en: Data recovery strategies not tested

options.description_zh: 定期测试数据恢复（年度），验证恢复流程
options.description_en: Regular testing of data recovery (annually), validating recovery process

options.description_zh: 定期测试数据恢复（季度或更频繁），自动化测试，验证RTO/RPO目标，包括配置漂移检测
options.description_en: Regular automated testing (quarterly or more), validating RTO/RPO goals, including configuration drift detection

questions.aws_best_practice: 建议至少季度进行 DR 演练。使用 AWS Backup 自动化备份，AWS CloudFormation 检测配置漂移。测试应包括：完全恢复时间测量、数据完整性验证、故障转移流程测试。
questions.why_important_en: An untested DR plan is equivalent to having no DR plan
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Recommend DR drills at least quarterly. Use AWS Backup for automated backups and AWS CloudFormation for drift detection. Tests should include: full recovery time measurement, data integrity validation, failover process testing.

questions.question_zh: 问题 31：DR计划有多详细？
questions.question_en: How detailed is the DR plan?
questions.why_important: 详细的DR计划是快速有效恢复的前提

options.description_zh: 无正式DR计划或仅有高层次概述
options.description_en: No formal DR plan or only high-level overview

options.description_zh: 有DR计划文档，但缺少详细步骤或未包含所有关键系统
options.description_en: DR plan documented but lacking detailed steps or not covering all critical systems

options.description_zh: 详细的DR计划：runbook、角色职责、RTO/RPO指标、依赖关系、恢复优先级、自动化脚本
options.description_en: Detailed DR plan: runbooks, role responsibilities, RTO/RPO metrics, dependencies, recovery priorities, automation scripts

questions.aws_best_practice: DR计划应包含：架构图、恢复步骤runbook、角色职责矩阵、RTO/RPO要求、依赖关系清单、测试计划。使用 AWS Resilience Hub 生成和维护DR计划。存储在版本控制系统并定期更新。
questions.why_important_en: A detailed DR plan is a prerequisite for fast and effective recovery
questions.aws_best_practice_en: DR plan should include: architecture diagrams, recovery step runbooks, role responsibility matrix, RTO/RPO requirements, dependency inventory, test plan. Use AWS Resilience Hub to generate and maintain DR plans. Store in version control and update regularly.

questions.question_zh: 问题 32：如何管理主站点和辅助站点之间的偏差？
questions.question_en: How do you manage drift between primary and secondary sites?
questions.why_important: 配置偏差会导致故障转移失败

options.description_zh: 未跟踪或管理主辅站点配置偏差
options.description_en: No tracking or management of primary-secondary site configuration drift

options.description_zh: 手动检查配置一致性，但频率低或不完整
options.description_en: Manual configuration consistency checks but infrequent or incomplete

options.description_zh: 自动化配置管理：IaC（Infrastructure as Code）、配置漂移检测、自动同步、持续验证
options.description_en: Automated configuration management: IaC, drift detection, automatic synchronization, continuous validation

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 IaC (CloudFormation/Terraform) 管理所有基础设施。使用 CloudFormation Drift Detection 检测配置偏差。实施 GitOps 工作流确保主辅站点从同一源部署。定期进行故障转移演练验证一致性。
questions.why_important_en: Configuration drift can cause failover failures
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use IaC (CloudFormation/Terraform) to manage all infrastructure. Use CloudFormation Drift Detection to detect configuration deviations. Implement GitOps workflow to ensure primary and secondary sites deploy from the same source. Regularly conduct failover drills to verify consistency.

questions.question_zh: 问题 33：如何防止故障转移站点达到AWS服务限制？
questions.question_en: How do you prevent the failover site from reaching AWS service limits?
questions.why_important: 故障转移站点的容量限制可能导致恢复失败

options.description_zh: 未考虑故障转移站点的AWS服务限制
options.description_en: AWS service limits at failover site not considered

options.description_zh: 知道限制，但未提前请求提升或验证
options.description_en: Aware of limits but not proactively requesting increases or validating

options.description_zh: 主动管理故障转移容量：提前提升限制、定期验证、容量预留、自动化检查
options.description_en: Proactive failover capacity management: advance limit increases, regular validation, capacity reservations, automated checks

questions.aws_best_practice: 为DR区域提前规划：1) 识别关键服务限制（EC2、EIP、VPC）；2) 请求与主区域相同的限制；3) 使用Capacity Reservations预留资源；4) 定期DR演练验证容量；5) 监控DR区域配额使用。使用 Service Quotas API 自动化。
questions.why_important_en: Capacity limits at the failover site can cause recovery failures
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Plan ahead for DR regions: 1) Identify critical service limits (EC2, EIP, VPC); 2) Request limits matching the primary region; 3) Use Capacity Reservations to reserve resources; 4) Regular DR drills to validate capacity; 5) Monitor DR region quota usage. Automate with Service Quotas API.

questions.question_zh: 问题 34：您的故障转移策略测试频率是多少？
questions.question_en: What is the frequency of testing your failover strategy?
questions.why_important: 定期测试是确保故障转移可靠性的唯一方法

options.description_zh: 从不或很少测试故障转移（年度或更少）
options.description_en: Never or rarely test failover (annually or less)

options.description_zh: 定期测试故障转移（年度），但仅在非生产环境
options.description_en: Regular failover testing (annually), but only in non-production

options.description_zh: 频繁测试故障转移（季度或月度），包括生产环境的受控故障转移
options.description_en: Frequent failover testing (quarterly or monthly), including controlled production failover

questions.aws_best_practice: 建议至少季度测试故障转移。复杂或关键的恢复路径应在生产中定期执行。使用 Route 53 健康检查和故障转移路由策略。考虑使用 AWS FIS 进行故障注入测试。
questions.why_important_en: Regular testing is the only way to ensure failover reliability
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Recommend at least quarterly failover testing. Complex or critical recovery paths should be regularly exercised in production. Use Route 53 health checks and failover routing policies. Consider using AWS FIS for fault injection testing.

questions.question_zh: 问题 35：您如何规划硬依赖故障？
questions.question_en: How do you plan for hard dependency failures?
questions.why_important: 硬依赖故障是导致级联故障的主要原因

options.description_zh: 未识别或规划硬依赖故障
options.description_en: Hard dependency failures not identified or planned for

options.description_zh: 识别了硬依赖，有基本的降级策略
options.description_en: Hard dependencies identified with basic degradation strategies

options.description_zh: 完整的硬依赖管理：优雅降级、断路器模式、缓存回退、超时和重试策略
options.description_en: Complete hard dependency management: graceful degradation, circuit breaker, cache fallback, timeout and retry strategies

questions.aws_best_practice: 实施优雅降级，将硬依赖转换为软依赖。使用断路器模式（如 AWS App Mesh 的断路器功能），在参数存储不可用时缓存合理默认值。对监控等非功能性依赖，即使无法发送遥测也应继续业务功能。
questions.why_important_en: Hard dependency failures are a primary cause of cascading failures
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Implement graceful degradation, converting hard dependencies to soft dependencies. Use circuit breaker pattern (e.g., AWS App Mesh circuit breaker functionality), cache reasonable defaults when parameter store is unavailable. For non-functional dependencies like monitoring, continue business functions even if telemetry cannot be sent.

questions.question_zh: 问题 36：您是如何定义和实现故障隔离边界的？
questions.question_en: How do you define and implement fault isolation boundaries?
questions.why_important: 故障隔离是AWS架构韧性的核心原则

options.description_zh: 单AZ部署，无故障隔离
options.description_en: Single AZ deployment, no fault isolation

options.description_zh: 多AZ部署，但未完全利用隔离边界（如控制平面依赖）
options.description_en: Multi-AZ deployment but not fully utilizing isolation boundaries (e.g., control plane dependencies)

options.description_zh: 完整的故障隔离：多AZ/多区域、控制平面与数据平面分离、单元化架构（如适用）
options.description_en: Complete fault isolation: Multi-AZ/Region, control/data plane separation, cell-based architecture (if applicable)

questions.aws_best_practice: 充分利用 AWS 故障隔离边界：可用区（AZ）、区域（Region）、控制平面与数据平面。关键应用应跨至少2个AZ部署。对于全球服务，考虑多区域主动-主动架构。了解依赖的 AWS 服务的隔离边界设计。
questions.why_important_en: Fault isolation is a core principle of AWS architecture resilience
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Fully utilize AWS fault isolation boundaries: Availability Zones (AZ), Regions, control plane vs. data plane. Critical applications should be deployed across at least 2 AZs. For global services, consider multi-Region active-active architecture. Understand the isolation boundary design of dependent AWS services.

questions.question_zh: 问题 37：如何疏散故障隔离边界？
questions.question_en: How do you evacuate a fault isolation boundary?
questions.why_important: 能够快速疏散故障域是应对AZ/Region故障的关键能力

options.description_zh: 无故障域疏散能力或完全依赖AWS自动故障转移
options.description_en: No fault domain evacuation capability or fully relying on AWS automatic failover

options.description_zh: 有基本的疏散流程，但需要手动操作或时间较长
options.description_en: Basic evacuation process exists but requires manual operations or takes considerable time

options.description_zh: 自动化疏散能力：监控触发、自动流量迁移、验证机制、回退策略
options.description_en: Automated evacuation capability: monitoring triggers, automatic traffic migration, verification mechanisms, rollback strategies

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 Route 53 健康检查和故障转移路由实现自动疏散。对于计算，使用 Auto Scaling 跨多个AZ。使用 Application Load Balancer 自动路由到健康目标。对于数据库，使用 Aurora Global Database 或 RDS Multi-AZ 快速故障转移。
questions.why_important_en: The ability to quickly evacuate fault domains is critical for responding to AZ/Region failures
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use Route 53 health checks and failover routing for automatic evacuation. For compute, use Auto Scaling across multiple AZs. Use Application Load Balancer to automatically route to healthy targets. For databases, use Aurora Global Database or RDS Multi-AZ for fast failover.

questions.question_zh: 问题 38：应在什么情况下评估已实施的高可用性 (HA) 控制措施的有效性？
questions.question_en: Under what circumstances should you evaluate effectiveness of HA controls?
questions.why_important: 需要数学证明HA设计能达到预期可用性

options.description_zh: 未定期评估HA控制有效性
options.description_en: HA control effectiveness not regularly evaluated

options.description_zh: 在重大变更或事故后评估HA有效性
options.description_en: Evaluate HA effectiveness after major changes or incidents

options.description_zh: 持续监控和评估HA有效性，包括部分故障模式（受影响用户百分比、延迟百分位数），可数学证明达到所需可用性水平
options.description_en: Continuous monitoring and evaluation of HA effectiveness, including partial failure modes (affected user %, latency percentiles), with mathematical proof of achieving required availability

questions.aws_best_practice: 可用性不应仅测量为二元状态（正常/宕机），应测量部分故障模式：受影响用户百分比、受影响位置百分比、延迟百分位数。使用 CloudWatch 和 CloudWatch Synthetics 持续监控可用性指标。
questions.why_important_en: Mathematical proof is needed that HA design achieves expected availability
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Availability should not be measured as binary (up/down) only; measure partial failure modes: affected user percentage, affected location percentage, latency percentiles. Use CloudWatch and CloudWatch Synthetics to continuously monitor availability metrics.

questions.question_zh: 问题 39：如何避免达到AWS服务限制？
questions.question_en: How do you avoid reaching AWS service limits?
questions.why_important: 服务限制可能在故障转移或扩展时导致系统不可用

options.description_zh: 未跟踪或管理AWS服务限制
options.description_en: No tracking or management of AWS service limits

options.description_zh: 了解关键服务限制，但未主动监控或提前请求提升
options.description_en: Aware of critical service limits but no proactive monitoring or advance increase requests

options.description_zh: 主动管理：监控使用率、提前请求限制提升、告警机制、容量规划包含限制分析
options.description_en: Proactive management: monitor utilization, advance limit increase requests, alerting mechanisms, capacity planning includes limit analysis

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 和 Service Quotas 控制台监控服务限制。为关键指标（如EC2实例、EIP、VPC）设置使用率告警（达到70%时）。提前规划DR和扩展场景的限制需求。使用 Service Quotas API 自动化限制管理。
questions.why_important_en: Service limits can cause system unavailability during failover or scaling
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use AWS Trusted Advisor and Service Quotas console to monitor service limits. Set usage alerts for critical metrics (e.g., EC2 instances, EIPs, VPCs) at 70% utilization. Plan ahead for DR and scaling scenario limit requirements. Automate limit management with Service Quotas API.

questions.question_zh: 问题 40：您如何评估代码部署方法？
questions.question_en: How do you evaluate code deployment methods?
questions.why_important: 部署方法直接影响变更风险和恢复能力

options.description_zh: 所有实施的手动变更管理流程
options.description_en: Manual change management process for all implementations

options.description_zh: 某些实现采用自动部署
options.description_en: Automated deployment is utilized for certain implementations

options.description_zh: 手动变更管理仅用于关键实施，并实施自动漂移检测
options.description_en: Manual change management reserved solely for critical implementations, with automated drift detection

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CI/CD 自动化部署，采用蓝绿或金丝雀部署策略。关键指标：操作员干预次数、每个版本的变更数量、部署频率。使用 AWS CodePipeline、CodeDeploy 实现自动化部署。
questions.why_important_en: Deployment methods directly impact change risk and recovery capability
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CI/CD for automated deployment with blue-green or canary deployment strategies. Key metrics: operator intervention count, changes per release, deployment frequency. Use AWS CodePipeline and CodeDeploy for automated deployment.

questions.question_zh: 问题 41：使用什么环境来测试部署？
questions.question_en: What environments are used to test deployments?
questions.why_important: 适当的测试环境可以在生产前发现问题

options.description_zh: 无独立测试环境，直接在生产部署
options.description_en: No separate test environment, deploy directly to production

options.description_zh: 有测试环境，但与生产环境配置差异大或无预发布环境
options.description_en: Have test environment but significant configuration differences from production or no pre-production staging

options.description_zh: 完整的环境层次：开发、测试、预发布（与生产一致）、生产，使用IaC确保一致性
options.description_en: Complete environment hierarchy: dev, test, staging (production-like), production, using IaC to ensure consistency

questions.aws_best_practice: 建议至少3个环境：开发、预发布、生产。使用 IaC 确保环境一致性。预发布环境应尽量接近生产（相同实例类型、配置）。使用 CloudFormation StackSets 或 Terraform workspaces 管理多环境。
questions.why_important_en: Proper test environments can catch issues before production
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Recommend at least 3 environments: dev, staging, production. Use IaC to ensure environment consistency. Staging should closely match production (same instance types, configuration). Use CloudFormation StackSets or Terraform workspaces for multi-environment management.

questions.question_zh: 问题 42：在生产环境中多久部署一次代码？
questions.question_en: How frequently is code deployed to production?
questions.why_important: 部署频率反映了CI/CD成熟度和变更风险管理能力

options.description_zh: 很少部署（月度或更低频率），每次变更量大
options.description_en: Infrequent deployments (monthly or less), large change batches

options.description_zh: 定期部署（每周或每两周），变更量适中
options.description_en: Regular deployments (weekly or bi-weekly), moderate change batches

options.description_zh: 高频部署（每日或按需），小批量变更，完全自动化CI/CD
options.description_en: High-frequency deployments (daily or on-demand), small change batches, fully automated CI/CD

questions.aws_best_practice: 遵循小批量、高频率部署原则。目标：每日部署或按需部署。使用 CI/CD (CodePipeline) 自动化部署流程。采用蓝绿或金丝雀部署降低风险。高部署频率可以降低每次变更的风险和影响。
questions.why_important_en: Deployment frequency reflects CI/CD maturity and change risk management capability
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Follow small-batch, high-frequency deployment principles. Target: daily or on-demand deployment. Use CI/CD (CodePipeline) to automate the deployment process. Adopt blue-green or canary deployment to reduce risk. High deployment frequency reduces the risk and impact of each change.

questions.question_zh: 问题 43：自动化在多大程度上集成到发布渠道中？
questions.question_en: To what extent is automation integrated into the release pipeline?
questions.why_important: 自动化减少人为错误并提高部署速度和一致性

options.description_zh: 大部分手动流程，自动化程度低
options.description_en: Mostly manual processes, low automation

options.description_zh: 部分自动化（如自动构建），但部署和测试仍需人工介入
options.description_en: Partially automated (e.g., automatic builds) but deployment and testing require manual intervention

options.description_zh: 端到端自动化：构建、测试、安全扫描、部署、验证、回滚全部自动化
options.description_en: End-to-end automation: build, test, security scanning, deployment, validation, rollback all automated

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 AWS CodePipeline 实现端到端自动化。集成 CodeBuild (构建)、CodeDeploy (部署)、CodeGuru (代码审查)。添加自动化测试门控（单元测试、集成测试、安全扫描）。使用 CloudFormation 或 CDK 自动化基础设施变更。
questions.why_important_en: Automation reduces human error and improves deployment speed and consistency
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use AWS CodePipeline for end-to-end automation. Integrate CodeBuild (build), CodeDeploy (deploy), CodeGuru (code review). Add automated test gates (unit tests, integration tests, security scanning). Use CloudFormation or CDK to automate infrastructure changes.

questions.question_zh: 问题 44：如何回滚失败的部署？
questions.question_en: How do you roll back failed deployments?
questions.why_important: 快速回滚能力是减少故障影响时间的关键

options.description_zh: 无正式回滚流程，需要手动修复或重新部署旧版本
options.description_en: No formal rollback process, requires manual fixes or redeployment of old version

options.description_zh: 有回滚能力，但需要手动触发或时间较长
options.description_en: Rollback capability exists but requires manual triggering or takes considerable time

options.description_zh: 自动回滚：监控触发、一键回滚、自动验证、保留多个版本
options.description_en: Automatic rollback: monitoring triggers, one-click rollback, automatic validation, multiple version retention

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 CodeDeploy 的自动回滚功能（基于CloudWatch告警触发）。采用蓝绿部署保持旧版本运行，可即时切换回去。使用 Lambda 版本和别名实现快速回滚。保留至少3个历史版本。设置回滚SLA目标（如<5分钟）。
questions.why_important_en: Rapid rollback capability is key to reducing failure impact duration
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use CodeDeploy automatic rollback (triggered by CloudWatch alarms). Adopt blue-green deployment to keep old versions running for instant switchback. Use Lambda versions and aliases for fast rollback. Retain at least 3 historical versions. Set rollback SLA target (e.g., <5 minutes).

questions.question_zh: 问题 45：如何验证变更是否成功？
questions.question_en: How do you verify that changes are successful?
questions.why_important: 变更验证确保部署真正达到预期效果

options.description_zh: 基本或无验证，主要依赖部署脚本成功
options.description_en: Basic or no validation, mainly relying on deployment script success

options.description_zh: 基本验证（如健康检查），但缺少业务逻辑验证或监控确认
options.description_en: Basic validation (e.g., health checks) but lacking business logic validation or monitoring confirmation

options.description_zh: 多层验证：健康检查、烟雾测试、关键指标监控、合成测试、逐步流量切换
options.description_en: Multi-layer validation: health checks, smoke tests, key metrics monitoring, synthetic tests, gradual traffic shifting

questions.aws_best_practice: 实施多层验证：1) 基础设施验证（实例健康）；2) 应用验证（健康端点）；3) 功能验证（自动化烟雾测试）；4) 业务验证（关键指标监控）。使用 CloudWatch 告警和 Synthetics 进行持续验证。采用金丝雀部署逐步验证。
questions.why_important_en: Change verification ensures deployments actually achieve the expected results
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Implement multi-layer validation: 1) Infrastructure validation (instance health); 2) Application validation (health endpoints); 3) Functional validation (automated smoke tests); 4) Business validation (key metrics monitoring). Use CloudWatch alarms and Synthetics for continuous validation. Adopt canary deployment for gradual verification.

questions.question_zh: 问题 46：如何管理系统的版本控制？
questions.question_en: How do you manage version control for the system?
questions.why_important: 版本控制是可追溯性和回滚能力的基础

options.description_zh: 无系统的版本控制或仅部分代码有版本管理
options.description_en: No systematic version control or only partial code version management

options.description_zh: 代码有版本控制，但配置或基础设施缺少版本管理
options.description_en: Code has version control but configuration or infrastructure lacks version management

options.description_zh: 全面版本控制：代码、配置、IaC、文档全部在Git中，有分支策略和标签管理
options.description_en: Comprehensive version control: code, configuration, IaC, documentation all in Git with branching strategy and tag management

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 Git (CodeCommit/GitHub) 管理所有资产：应用代码、IaC模板、配置文件、部署脚本、文档。采用 GitFlow 或 trunk-based development 分支策略。使用语义化版本号（如v1.2.3）。所有生产部署必须来自版本控制的tagged release。
questions.why_important_en: Version control is the foundation for traceability and rollback capability
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use Git (CodeCommit/GitHub) to manage all assets: application code, IaC templates, configuration files, deployment scripts, documentation. Adopt GitFlow or trunk-based development branching strategy. Use semantic versioning (e.g., v1.2.3). All production deployments must come from version-controlled tagged releases.

questions.question_zh: 问题 47：如何确保代码符合组织标准？
questions.question_en: How do you ensure code complies with organizational standards?
questions.why_important: 代码标准确保质量一致性和可维护性

options.description_zh: 无代码标准或依赖个人习惯
options.description_en: No code standards or relying on individual preferences

options.description_zh: 有代码标准文档，但缺少自动化检查
options.description_en: Code standards documented but lacking automated checks

options.description_zh: 自动化的代码标准检查：linting、格式化、安全扫描、代码审查流程、门控检查
options.description_en: Automated code standards checks: linting, formatting, security scanning, code review process, gate checks

questions.aws_best_practice: 在CI/CD中集成代码质量检查：1) CodeGuru审查代码质量和安全；2) 静态分析工具（SonarQube）；3) 安全扫描（Inspector、GuardDuty）；4) 代码覆盖率要求；5) 强制代码审查。失败则阻止部署。
questions.why_important_en: Code standards ensure quality consistency and maintainability
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Integrate code quality checks into CI/CD: 1) CodeGuru for code quality and security; 2) Static analysis tools (SonarQube); 3) Security scanning (Inspector, GuardDuty); 4) Code coverage requirements; 5) Mandatory code reviews. Failures block deployment.

questions.question_zh: 问题 48：你如何计划对事件的应对？
questions.question_en: How do you plan for incident response?
questions.why_important: 事件响应计划是事故管理的基础

options.description_zh: 无正式的事件响应计划
options.description_en: No formal incident response plan

options.description_zh: 有基本的事件响应计划，但未定期演练
options.description_en: Basic incident response plan exists but not regularly practiced

options.description_zh: 详细的事件管理计划，包括角色职责、沟通计划、响应阶段、严重程度定义，定期演练和更新
options.description_en: Detailed incident management plan with roles, communication plan, response phases, severity definitions, regularly practiced and updated

questions.aws_best_practice: 制定详细的事件管理计划，包括：事件响应团队概述、利益相关者角色、带外沟通渠道、响应阶段（检测、分析、遏制、根除、恢复）、严重程度定义和升级程序。使用 AWS Systems Manager Incident Manager 自动化事件响应。
questions.why_important_en: Incident response planning is the foundation of incident management
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Develop a detailed incident management plan including: incident response team overview, stakeholder roles, out-of-band communication channels, response phases (detection, analysis, containment, eradication, recovery), severity definitions, and escalation procedures. Use AWS Systems Manager Incident Manager to automate incident response.

questions.question_zh: 问题 49：事件手册是否自动化？
questions.question_en: Are incident playbooks automated?
questions.why_important: 自动化runbook减少响应时间和人为错误

options.description_zh: 无正式的事件手册或完全依赖手动操作
options.description_en: No formal incident playbooks or fully relying on manual operations

options.description_zh: 有文档化的runbook，但执行是手动的
options.description_en: Have documented runbooks but execution is manual

options.description_zh: 自动化runbook：Systems Manager Automation，一键执行常见修复操作，自动诊断工具
options.description_en: Automated runbooks: Systems Manager Automation, one-click execution of common remediation operations, automated diagnostic tools

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Automation 自动化常见事件响应任务。创建自动化文档（runbook）处理常见问题（如重启实例、清理磁盘、扩容）。集成到 Incident Manager 实现一键执行。定期测试和更新runbook。
questions.why_important_en: Automated runbooks reduce response time and human error
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use AWS Systems Manager Automation to automate common incident response tasks. Create automation documents (runbooks) for common issues (e.g., restart instances, clean disk, scale up). Integrate with Incident Manager for one-click execution. Regularly test and update runbooks.

questions.question_zh: 问题 50：对团队进行事件管理培训的方法是什么？
questions.question_en: What methods are used to train teams on incident management?
questions.why_important: 训练有素的团队可以更有效地处理事件

options.description_zh: 无正式培训，主要依赖经验积累
options.description_en: No formal training, mainly relying on experience accumulation

options.description_zh: 有基本培训（如新员工培训），但缺少定期演练或情景模拟
options.description_en: Basic training exists (e.g., onboarding) but lacking regular drills or scenario simulations

options.description_zh: 系统化培训：定期演练、游戏日、事后复盘学习、轮岗on-call、文档化最佳实践
options.description_en: Systematic training: regular drills, game days, post-incident learning, on-call rotation, documented best practices

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立系统化培训计划：1) 新员工培训（事件流程、工具使用）；2) 定期事件响应演练（模拟真实场景）；3) Game Days（全面灾难恢复演练）；4) 事后复盘学习会；5) on-call轮岗培养能力；6) 文档化经验教训。
questions.why_important_en: Well-trained teams can handle incidents more effectively
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish systematic training plans: 1) New hire training (incident processes, tools); 2) Regular incident response drills (simulating real scenarios); 3) Game Days (full disaster recovery drills); 4) Post-incident learning sessions; 5) On-call rotation to build capability; 6) Document lessons learned.

questions.question_zh: 问题 51：一个人将事件升级的程序是什么？
questions.question_en: What is the procedure for escalating an incident?
questions.why_important: 明确的升级程序确保快速响应

options.description_zh: 无明确的升级程序
options.description_en: No clear escalation procedure

options.description_zh: 有升级路径，但未明确何时升级的标准
options.description_en: Escalation path exists but criteria for escalation not clear

options.description_zh: 明确的升级路径、升级触发条件、每一步的所有者、预先批准的缓解措施、定期培训
options.description_en: Clear escalation path, escalation triggers, owners at each step, pre-approved mitigations, regular training

questions.aws_best_practice: 明确升级路径，提供联系方式。设置 CloudWatch 警报在 Systems Manager Incident Manager 中创建事件。预先批准预期情景的缓解措施。定期进行事件响应演习。
questions.why_important_en: Clear escalation procedures ensure rapid response
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Define clear escalation paths with contact information. Set up CloudWatch alarms to create incidents in Systems Manager Incident Manager. Pre-approve mitigations for expected scenarios. Regularly conduct incident response exercises.

questions.question_zh: 问题 52：事件报告有多详细？
questions.question_en: How detailed are incident reports?
questions.why_important: 详细的事件报告是持续改进的基础

options.description_zh: 无正式事件报告或仅记录简单描述
options.description_en: No formal incident reports or only brief descriptions recorded

options.description_zh: 基本事件报告，但缺少根本原因分析或改进行动项
options.description_en: Basic incident reports but lacking root cause analysis or improvement action items

options.description_zh: 详细事件报告：时间线、影响范围、根本原因（5 Why）、改进行动项、跟踪状态
options.description_en: Detailed incident reports: timeline, impact scope, root cause (5 Why), improvement action items, tracking status

questions.aws_best_practice: 事件报告应包含：事件摘要、时间线（检测、响应、恢复）、影响分析（用户、业务）、根本原因分析（5 Why法）、改进行动项（具体、可衡量、有Owner）。使用 Incident Manager 记录和跟踪。定期审查行动项完成情况。
questions.why_important_en: Detailed incident reports are the foundation for continuous improvement
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Incident reports should include: incident summary, timeline (detection, response, recovery), impact analysis (users, business), root cause analysis (5 Whys method), improvement action items (specific, measurable, with owners). Use Incident Manager for recording and tracking. Regularly review action item completion.

questions.question_zh: 问题 53：是否跟踪团队如何使用报告存储库？
questions.question_en: Do you track how teams use the report repository?
questions.why_important: 跟踪报告使用情况确保知识传播

options.description_zh: 不跟踪事件报告的使用情况
options.description_en: No tracking of incident report usage

options.description_zh: 知道报告存在，但不知道是否被阅读或应用
options.description_en: Reports exist but unknown if read or applied

options.description_zh: 主动跟踪报告使用：阅读统计、反馈收集、知识应用验证、定期分享会
options.description_en: Proactive report usage tracking: reading statistics, feedback collection, knowledge application verification, regular sharing sessions

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立事件知识管理：1) 使用wiki存储报告（Confluence/Notion）；2) 跟踪阅读数和评论；3) 定期全员分享会（月度）；4) 提取经验教训到培训材料；5) 验证改进措施执行情况。
questions.why_important_en: Tracking report usage ensures knowledge dissemination
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish incident knowledge management: 1) Use wiki for report storage (Confluence/Notion); 2) Track read counts and comments; 3) Regular all-hands sharing sessions (monthly); 4) Extract lessons learned into training materials; 5) Verify improvement measure execution.

questions.question_zh: 问题 54：如何应用从事件中获得的见解？
questions.question_en: How do you apply insights gained from incidents?
questions.why_important: 将事件转化为改进是提升韧性的关键

options.description_zh: 事件后很少或不进行系统性改进
options.description_en: Rarely or no systematic improvements after incidents

options.description_zh: 有改进计划，但执行不一致或缺少跟踪
options.description_en: Have improvement plans but inconsistent execution or lacking tracking

options.description_zh: 系统化改进流程：分配Owner、设置截止日期、跟踪进度、验证有效性、分享经验教训
options.description_en: Systematic improvement process: assign owners, set deadlines, track progress, validate effectiveness, share lessons learned

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立闭环改进流程：1) 事后复盘会议（无责备文化）；2) 识别改进机会（技术、流程、人员）；3) 创建行动项（Jira/GitHub Issues）；4) 分配Owner和截止日期；5) 定期review进度；6) 验证改进有效性；7) 分享到团队wiki或all-hands。
questions.why_important_en: Turning incidents into improvements is key to enhancing resilience
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish a closed-loop improvement process: 1) Post-incident review meeting (blameless culture); 2) Identify improvement opportunities (technical, process, people); 3) Create action items (Jira/GitHub Issues); 4) Assign owners and deadlines; 5) Regularly review progress; 6) Validate improvement effectiveness; 7) Share to team wiki or all-hands.

questions.question_zh: 问题 55：如何通知客户和相关第三方事件？
questions.question_en: How do you notify customers and relevant third parties about incidents?
questions.why_important: 及时透明的沟通维护客户信任

options.description_zh: 无正式的客户通知流程或事后才通知
options.description_en: No formal customer notification process or only notify after the fact

options.description_zh: 有通知机制，但不及时或缺少状态更新
options.description_en: Notification mechanism exists but not timely or lacking status updates

options.description_zh: 主动通知流程：状态页面、自动通知、定时更新、事后报告、多渠道沟通
options.description_en: Proactive notification process: status page, automatic notifications, regular updates, post-incident reports, multi-channel communication

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立多层通知机制：1) 状态页面（如StatusPage.io）实时更新；2) 邮件/SMS自动通知受影响客户；3) 定时更新（如每30分钟）；4) 事后发布详细报告；5) 社交媒体同步。使用 Amazon SNS 实现多渠道通知。准备通信模板加快响应速度。
questions.why_important_en: Timely and transparent communication maintains customer trust
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish multi-tier notification mechanisms: 1) Status page (e.g., StatusPage.io) for real-time updates; 2) Email/SMS auto-notification to affected customers; 3) Regular updates (e.g., every 30 minutes); 4) Post-incident detailed reports; 5) Social media sync. Use Amazon SNS for multi-channel notifications. Prepare communication templates to speed up response.

questions.question_zh: 问题 56：团队是否拥有他们使用的事件管理流程？
questions.question_en: Do teams own the incident management processes they use?
questions.why_important: 团队自主权提高流程适应性和改进积极性

options.description_zh: 流程由外部强制规定，团队无修改权限
options.description_en: Processes mandated externally, teams have no modification authority

options.description_zh: 团队有一定自主权，但需要审批才能修改流程
options.description_en: Teams have some autonomy but require approval to modify processes

options.description_zh: 团队完全拥有流程：可自主优化、定期review和改进、共享最佳实践
options.description_en: Teams fully own processes: can autonomously optimize, regularly review and improve, share best practices

questions.aws_best_practice: 遵循 DevOps 文化，团队拥有其运维流程。提供基础框架（如Incident Manager）但允许团队定制。鼓励团队定期review和改进流程。建立跨团队论坛分享最佳实践。平衡自主权与一致性（核心原则统一，细节允许差异）。
questions.why_important_en: Team autonomy improves process adaptability and motivation for improvement
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Follow DevOps culture where teams own their operational processes. Provide foundational frameworks (e.g., Incident Manager) but allow teams to customize. Encourage teams to regularly review and improve processes. Establish cross-team forums to share best practices. Balance autonomy with consistency (unified core principles, flexible details).

questions.question_zh: 问题 57：响应小组是否有权采取行动？
questions.question_en: Does the response team have authority to take action?
questions.why_important: 团队授权加快事件响应速度

options.description_zh: 响应团队缺少执行权限，需要层层审批
options.description_en: Response team lacks execution authority, requiring multi-level approvals

options.description_zh: 有基本权限，但关键操作仍需审批
options.description_en: Basic permissions exist but critical operations still require approval

options.description_zh: 充分授权：预先批准的应急操作、清晰的权限边界、事后审查机制
options.description_en: Full authorization: pre-approved emergency operations, clear permission boundaries, post-incident review mechanisms

questions.aws_best_practice: 实施分级授权：1) 预先批准常见缓解措施（重启、扩展）；2) 定义紧急权限（break-glass）；3) 使用IAM角色和策略管理权限；4) 记录所有操作（CloudTrail）；5) 事后审查权限使用。
questions.why_important_en: Team authorization accelerates incident response speed
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Implement tiered authorization: 1) Pre-approve common mitigations (restart, scale); 2) Define emergency permissions (break-glass); 3) Use IAM roles and policies to manage permissions; 4) Log all operations (CloudTrail); 5) Post-incident permission usage review.

questions.question_zh: 问题 58：谁参加运营审查？
questions.question_en: Who participates in operational reviews?
questions.why_important: 多方参与的运营评审提供全面视角

options.description_zh: 无正式运营评审或仅技术团队参与
options.description_en: No formal operational reviews or only technical team participation

options.description_zh: 有运营评审，但缺少业务或管理层参与
options.description_en: Operational reviews exist but lacking business or management participation

options.description_zh: 全面参与：技术团队、业务负责人、管理层、客户代表（如适用），结构化议程
options.description_en: Comprehensive participation: technical teams, business owners, management, customer representatives (if applicable), structured agenda

questions.aws_best_practice: 运营评审参与者应包括：1) 服务所有者；2) SRE/运维团队；3) 业务负责人；4) 高级管理层（季度）；5) 安全和合规团队。使用标准化议程：KPI回顾、事件分析、改进进展、风险评估。
questions.why_important_en: Multi-stakeholder operational reviews provide comprehensive perspectives
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Operational review participants should include: 1) Service owners; 2) SRE/operations teams; 3) Business owners; 4) Senior management (quarterly); 5) Security and compliance teams. Use standardized agendas: KPI review, incident analysis, improvement progress, risk assessment.

questions.question_zh: 问题 59：运营审查多久进行一次？
questions.question_en: How frequently are operational reviews conducted?
questions.why_important: 定期评审确保持续关注运营健康

options.description_zh: 很少或从不进行运营评审
options.description_en: Rarely or never conduct operational reviews

options.description_zh: 不定期进行，频率取决于事件
options.description_en: Irregularly conducted, frequency depends on incidents

options.description_zh: 定期评审：每周（团队级）、每月（服务级）、每季度（管理层），结构化流程
options.description_en: Regular reviews: weekly (team level), monthly (service level), quarterly (management level), structured process

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立分层评审节奏：1) 每周：团队站会，回顾运维指标；2) 每月：服务评审，详细分析趋势；3) 每季度：管理层评审，战略调整。使用 CloudWatch Dashboards 准备数据。记录行动项并跟踪。
questions.why_important_en: Regular reviews ensure continuous focus on operational health
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish layered review cadence: 1) Weekly: team standups reviewing operational metrics; 2) Monthly: service reviews with detailed trend analysis; 3) Quarterly: management reviews for strategic adjustments. Use CloudWatch Dashboards to prepare data. Record action items and track them.

questions.question_zh: 问题 60：运营审查有多彻底？
questions.question_en: How thorough are operational reviews?
questions.why_important: 彻底的评审识别深层次问题和改进机会

options.description_zh: 评审流于形式，缺少深度分析
options.description_en: Reviews superficial, lacking deep analysis

options.description_zh: 有基本的数据回顾，但缺少根本原因分析
options.description_en: Basic data review but lacking root cause analysis

options.description_zh: 深入评审：趋势分析、根本原因分析、预测性洞察、可操作的改进建议
options.description_en: Thorough reviews: trend analysis, root cause analysis, predictive insights, actionable improvement recommendations

questions.aws_best_practice: 运营评审应包含：1) KPI趋势分析（可用性、延迟、错误率）；2) 事件模式分析；3) 容量和成本趋势；4) SLO合规性；5) 改进措施有效性评估；6) 新风险识别。使用数据驱动决策。
questions.why_important_en: Thorough reviews identify deep-rooted issues and improvement opportunities
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Operational reviews should include: 1) KPI trend analysis (availability, latency, error rates); 2) Incident pattern analysis; 3) Capacity and cost trends; 4) SLO compliance; 5) Improvement measure effectiveness assessment; 6) New risk identification. Use data-driven decision making.

questions.question_zh: 问题 61：如何监控运营绩效？
questions.question_en: How do you monitor operational performance?
questions.why_important: 运营绩效监控确保持续改进

options.description_zh: 无系统性的运营绩效监控
options.description_en: No systematic operational performance monitoring

options.description_zh: 跟踪基本指标，但缺少目标或基准对比
options.description_en: Track basic metrics but lacking targets or benchmark comparison

options.description_zh: 全面的绩效监控：KPI仪表板、目标跟踪、趋势分析、自动化报告、持续改进指标
options.description_en: Comprehensive performance monitoring: KPI dashboards, target tracking, trend analysis, automated reporting, continuous improvement metrics

questions.aws_best_practice: 定义运营KPI：1) 可用性和性能（SLO合规）；2) 事件指标（MTTR、MTBF、严重事件数）；3) 变更成功率；4) 自动化程度；5) 成本效率。使用 CloudWatch 仪表板和告警跟踪。每月review进展。
questions.why_important_en: Operational performance monitoring ensures continuous improvement
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Define operational KPIs: 1) Availability and performance (SLO compliance); 2) Incident metrics (MTTR, MTBF, critical incident count); 3) Change success rate; 4) Automation level; 5) Cost efficiency. Track using CloudWatch dashboards and alerts. Review progress monthly.

questions.question_zh: 问题 62：实验负载在多大程度上反映生产流量？
questions.question_en: To what extent does experiment load reflect production traffic?
questions.why_important: 真实的负载测试确保实验结果可靠

options.description_zh: 实验负载不代表生产流量
options.description_en: Experiment load not representative of production traffic

options.description_zh: 使用近似的负载模式，但缺少真实流量特征
options.description_en: Use approximate load patterns but lacking real traffic characteristics

options.description_zh: 高度真实的负载：从生产流量录制回放、包含真实数据分布和峰值模式
options.description_en: Highly realistic load: replay from production traffic recordings, includes real data distribution and peak patterns

questions.aws_best_practice: 使用真实流量模式进行测试：1) 使用ALB访问日志分析流量模式；2) 使用工具录制和回放流量（AWS FIS、Gatling）；3) 包含峰值场景；4) 测试数据应代表生产数据分布。在预发布环境进行。
questions.why_important_en: Realistic load testing ensures reliable experiment results
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Use real traffic patterns for testing: 1) Analyze traffic patterns using ALB access logs; 2) Use tools to record and replay traffic (AWS FIS, Gatling); 3) Include peak scenarios; 4) Test data should represent production data distribution. Conduct in pre-production environments.

questions.question_zh: 问题 63：混沌实验条件有多现实？
questions.question_en: How realistic are chaos experiment conditions?
questions.why_important: 现实的实验条件提供可信的韧性验证

options.description_zh: 实验条件简化，不反映真实故障
options.description_en: Simplified experiment conditions, not reflecting real failures

options.description_zh: 模拟常见故障，但缺少复杂场景或级联故障
options.description_en: Simulate common failures but lacking complex scenarios or cascading failures

options.description_zh: 高度现实的场景：多点故障、级联故障、部分故障、真实时间约束
options.description_en: Highly realistic scenarios: multi-point failures, cascading failures, partial failures, real-time constraints

questions.aws_best_practice: 设计现实的混沌实验：1) 基于历史事件；2) 测试多点故障（AZ故障+依赖延迟）；3) 包含部分故障（20%请求失败）；4) 模拟网络分区；5) 测试恢复过程。使用 AWS FIS 执行。
questions.why_important_en: Realistic experiment conditions provide credible resilience validation
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Design realistic chaos experiments: 1) Based on historical incidents; 2) Test multi-point failures (AZ failure + dependency latency); 3) Include partial failures (20% request failure); 4) Simulate network partitions; 5) Test recovery processes. Execute using AWS FIS.

questions.question_zh: 问题 64：混沌实验在哪个环境中进行？
questions.question_en: In what environment are chaos experiments conducted?
questions.why_important: 生产环境测试是验证真实韧性的唯一方法

options.description_zh: 仅在开发或测试环境进行实验
options.description_en: Experiments only in dev or test environments

options.description_zh: 在预发布环境进行，但与生产有差异
options.description_en: Conducted in staging but differs from production

options.description_zh: 在生产环境进行受控实验：小规模测试、逐步扩大、完整监控、快速回滚能力
options.description_en: Controlled experiments in production: small-scale tests, gradual expansion, complete monitoring, rapid rollback capability

questions.aws_best_practice: 生产混沌工程遵循渐进原则：1) 从非关键服务开始；2) 使用流量百分比控制爆炸半径；3) 在低流量时段；4) 准备回滚机制；5) 实时监控影响。使用 AWS FIS 的安全护栏（stop condition）。
questions.why_important_en: Production environment testing is the only way to validate real resilience
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Production chaos engineering follows a progressive approach: 1) Start with non-critical services; 2) Use traffic percentage to control blast radius; 3) During low-traffic periods; 4) Prepare rollback mechanisms; 5) Monitor impact in real-time. Use AWS FIS safety guardrails (stop conditions).

questions.question_zh: 问题 65：混沌实验的可重复性如何？
questions.question_en: How repeatable are chaos experiments?
questions.why_important: 可重复性确保实验结果可验证

options.description_zh: 实验过程不可重复或依赖手动操作
options.description_en: Experiments not repeatable or relying on manual operations

options.description_zh: 有基本的脚本，但需要手动调整参数
options.description_en: Basic scripts exist but require manual parameter adjustments

options.description_zh: 完全自动化和可重复：参数化实验模板、版本控制、自动化执行、结果对比
options.description_en: Fully automated and repeatable: parameterized experiment templates, version control, automated execution, result comparison

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立实验库：1) 使用 AWS FIS 模板定义实验；2) 参数化配置（爆炸半径、持续时间）；3) 存储在Git版本控制；4) 自动化执行（定期或CI/CD）；5) 结果存储和对比分析。
questions.why_important_en: Repeatability ensures experiment results can be verified
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Build an experiment library: 1) Define experiments using AWS FIS templates; 2) Parameterized configuration (blast radius, duration); 3) Store in Git version control; 4) Automated execution (periodic or CI/CD); 5) Result storage and comparative analysis.

questions.question_zh: 问题 66：混沌实验多久进行一次？
questions.question_en: How frequently are chaos experiments conducted?
questions.why_important: 定期实验确保韧性不会退化

options.description_zh: 很少或从不进行混沌实验
options.description_en: Rarely or never conduct chaos experiments

options.description_zh: 不定期进行，通常在重大变更后
options.description_en: Irregularly conducted, usually after major changes

options.description_zh: 定期进行：每周/每月自动化实验、季度Game Days、重大变更前验证
options.description_en: Regular experiments: weekly/monthly automated tests, quarterly Game Days, validation before major changes

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立混沌实验节奏：1) 每周：自动化基础实验（单点故障）；2) 每月：复杂场景实验；3) 每季度：全面Game Days；4) 每次重大变更前：回归测试。记录结果并跟踪改进。
questions.why_important_en: Regular experiments ensure resilience does not degrade
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish chaos experiment cadence: 1) Weekly: automated basic experiments (single-point failures); 2) Monthly: complex scenario experiments; 3) Quarterly: comprehensive Game Days; 4) Before each major change: regression testing. Record results and track improvements.

questions.question_zh: 问题 67：如何测试故障隔离边界？
questions.question_en: How do you test fault isolation boundaries?
questions.why_important: 故障隔离边界测试验证架构韧性

options.description_zh: 未测试故障隔离边界
options.description_en: Fault isolation boundaries not tested

options.description_zh: 有基本的AZ故障测试，但未测试更广泛的隔离边界
options.description_en: Basic AZ failure tests but not testing broader isolation boundaries

options.description_zh: 全面的隔离测试：AZ故障、Region故障、控制平面与数据平面、单元隔离（如适用）
options.description_en: Comprehensive isolation testing: AZ failure, Region failure, control/data plane, cell isolation (if applicable)

questions.aws_best_practice: 测试多层故障隔离：1) AZ级：使用 AWS FIS 注入AZ故障；2) Region级：测试跨区域故障转移；3) 服务级：隔离单个服务故障；4) Cell级：测试单元化架构隔离。验证影响范围符合预期。
questions.why_important_en: Fault isolation boundary testing validates architecture resilience
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Test multi-layer fault isolation: 1) AZ-level: inject AZ failures using AWS FIS; 2) Region-level: test cross-region failover; 3) Service-level: isolate single service failures; 4) Cell-level: test cell-based architecture isolation. Verify impact scope meets expectations.

questions.question_zh: 问题 68：正在进行哪些类型的测试？
questions.question_en: What types of testing are being conducted?
questions.why_important: 多样化的测试覆盖不同故障场景

options.description_zh: 测试类型单一，仅覆盖基本故障
options.description_en: Single test type, only covering basic failures

options.description_zh: 有多种测试类型，但覆盖不全面
options.description_en: Multiple test types but coverage not comprehensive

options.description_zh: 全面的测试套件：资源故障、网络故障、性能降级、数据损坏、安全事件、级联故障
