options.description_en: Comprehensive test suite: resource failures, network failures, performance degradation, data corruption, security events, cascading failures

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立测试矩阵覆盖：1) 资源故障（EC2终止、磁盘满）；2) 网络问题（延迟、丢包、分区）；3) 依赖故障（API错误、超时）；4) 性能降级（CPU节流、IO限制）；5) 安全事件（凭证泄露）。使用 AWS FIS 实现。
questions.why_important_en: Diverse testing covers different failure scenarios
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Build a test matrix covering: 1) Resource failures (EC2 termination, disk full); 2) Network issues (latency, packet loss, partitions); 3) Dependency failures (API errors, timeouts); 4) Performance degradation (CPU throttling, IO limits); 5) Security events (credential leaks). Implement using AWS FIS.

questions.question_zh: 问题 69：是否保留了实验目录？
questions.question_en: Is an experiment catalog maintained?
questions.why_important: 实验目录促进知识共享和重复使用

options.description_zh: 未保留实验记录或散落各处
options.description_en: No experiment records kept or scattered everywhere

options.description_zh: 有基本的实验文档，但不集中或难以查找
options.description_en: Basic experiment documentation exists but not centralized or hard to find

options.description_zh: 完整的实验库：集中存储、分类标签、搜索功能、结果对比、最佳实践
options.description_en: Complete experiment catalog: centralized storage, categorized tags, search capability, result comparison, best practices

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立混沌工程知识库：1) 使用Git存储FIS实验模板；2) Wiki文档化实验设计和结果；3) 标签分类（故障类型、服务、严重性）；4) 记录学到的经验教训；5) 定期分享会展示结果。使用 AWS FIS 实验模板库。
questions.why_important_en: Experiment catalogs promote knowledge sharing and reuse
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Build a chaos engineering knowledge base: 1) Store FIS experiment templates in Git; 2) Document experiment designs and results in wiki; 3) Tag categories (failure type, service, severity); 4) Record lessons learned; 5) Regular sharing sessions to present results. Use AWS FIS experiment template library.

questions.question_zh: 问题 70：为应用团队提供了哪些混沌工程指导？
questions.question_en: What chaos engineering guidance is provided to application teams?
questions.why_important: 指导和培训提高混沌工程的采用率和质量

options.description_zh: 无混沌工程指导，团队自行探索
options.description_en: No chaos engineering guidance, teams explore on their own

options.description_zh: 有基本文档，但缺少培训或实践支持
options.description_en: Basic documentation exists but lacking training or hands-on support

options.description_zh: 全面的支持体系：培训课程、实践工作坊、卓越中心（CoE）、导师计划、工具平台
options.description_en: Comprehensive support system: training courses, hands-on workshops, Center of Excellence (CoE), mentor program, tooling platform

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立混沌工程能力：1) 创建培训材料（原则、工具、案例）；2) 组织动手实验室（使用AWS FIS）；3) 建立CoE提供咨询；4) 提供预定义实验模板；5) 分享成功案例。从试点团队开始，逐步扩展。
questions.why_important_en: Guidance and training improve chaos engineering adoption rates and quality
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Build chaos engineering capabilities: 1) Create training materials (principles, tools, case studies); 2) Organize hands-on labs (using AWS FIS); 3) Establish CoE for consulting; 4) Provide pre-defined experiment templates; 5) Share success stories. Start with pilot teams and gradually expand.

questions.question_zh: 问题 71：如何在实验期间实施监测？
questions.question_en: How is monitoring implemented during experiments?
questions.why_important: 实验期间的监测确保安全并收集数据

options.description_zh: 实验期间缺少监测或仅被动观察
options.description_en: Lacking monitoring during experiments or only passive observation

options.description_zh: 有基本监测，但缺少实时告警或自动化停止
options.description_en: Basic monitoring exists but lacking real-time alerts or automated stops

options.description_zh: 全面的实验监测：实时仪表板、自动告警、停止条件、影响度量、性能基线对比
options.description_en: Comprehensive experiment monitoring: real-time dashboards, automatic alerts, stop conditions, impact metrics, performance baseline comparison

questions.aws_best_practice: 实施安全护栏：1) 使用AWS FIS stop conditions（CloudWatch告警触发）；2) 实时监控关键指标（可用性、延迟、错误率）；3) 设置爆炸半径限制；4) 准备回滚机制；5) 记录所有观察结果。在专用仪表板实时监控实验影响。
questions.why_important_en: Monitoring during experiments ensures safety and data collection
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Implement safety guardrails: 1) Use AWS FIS stop conditions (CloudWatch alarm triggered); 2) Monitor key metrics in real-time (availability, latency, error rate); 3) Set blast radius limits; 4) Prepare rollback mechanisms; 5) Record all observations. Monitor experiment impact in real-time on dedicated dashboards.

questions.question_zh: 问题 72：实验如何集成到SDLC中？
questions.question_en: How are experiments integrated into the SDLC?
questions.why_important: 将实验集成到SDLC确保持续韧性验证

options.description_zh: 混沌实验与SDLC分离，手动触发
options.description_en: Chaos experiments separate from SDLC, manually triggered

options.description_zh: 部分集成，在特定阶段手动执行
options.description_en: Partially integrated, manually executed at specific phases

options.description_zh: 深度集成：CI/CD自动触发、部署前验证、持续测试、结果门控
options.description_en: Deep integration: CI/CD auto-trigger, pre-deployment validation, continuous testing, result gating

questions.aws_best_practice: 在SDLC中集成混沌工程：1) 在预发布环境运行自动化实验；2) 重大变更前运行回归测试；3) 使用CodePipeline集成FIS实验；4) 失败则阻止生产部署；5) 定期在生产运行非破坏性实验。shift-left混沌工程。
questions.why_important_en: Integrating experiments into the SDLC ensures continuous resilience validation
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Integrate chaos engineering into SDLC: 1) Run automated experiments in pre-production; 2) Run regression tests before major changes; 3) Integrate FIS experiments with CodePipeline; 4) Failures block production deployment; 5) Regularly run non-destructive experiments in production. Shift-left chaos engineering.

questions.question_zh: 问题 73：组织如何从个别团队实验中学习？
questions.question_en: How does the organization learn from individual team experiments?
questions.why_important: 组织级学习放大单个实验的价值

options.description_zh: 实验结果仅限于执行团队
options.description_en: Experiment results limited to executing team

options.description_zh: 有分享机制，但不系统或参与度低
options.description_en: Sharing mechanism exists but not systematic or low participation

options.description_zh: 组织级学习：定期分享会、知识库、跨团队复制、公司级Game Days、最佳实践传播
options.description_en: Organization-wide learning: regular sharing sessions, knowledge base, cross-team replication, company-wide Game Days, best practice propagation

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立学习文化：1) 月度混沌工程分享会；2) 内部wiki记录所有实验；3) 鼓励团队复制成功实验；4) 组织公司级Game Days；5) 建立混沌工程社区（Slack channel）；6) 表彰最佳实践。无责备文化是关键。
questions.why_important_en: Organization-level learning amplifies the value of individual experiments
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Build learning culture: 1) Monthly chaos engineering sharing sessions; 2) Internal wiki documenting all experiments; 3) Encourage teams to replicate successful experiments; 4) Organize company-wide Game Days; 5) Establish chaos engineering community (Slack channel); 6) Recognize best practices. Blameless culture is key.

questions.question_zh: 问题 74：Game Days对实际环境的模拟程度？
questions.question_en: How well do Game Days simulate the real environment?
questions.why_important: 真实的演练环境提供可靠的韧性验证

options.description_zh: Game Days在简化环境进行，与生产差异大
options.description_en: Game Days in simplified environment, significantly different from production

options.description_zh: 在预发布环境进行，较接近但仍有差异
options.description_en: Conducted in staging environment, closer but still differences

options.description_zh: 在生产环境进行：真实流量、真实依赖、真实团队、真实压力
options.description_en: Conducted in production: real traffic, real dependencies, real teams, real pressure

questions.aws_best_practice: 生产Game Days最佳实践：1) 选择低流量时段；2) 从小规模开始（单个服务/区域）；3) 使用流量百分比控制影响；4) 准备快速回滚；5) 全员参与（不仅是运维）；6) 实时监控用户影响。获得管理层支持。
questions.why_important_en: Realistic drill environments provide reliable resilience validation
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Production Game Day best practices: 1) Choose low-traffic windows; 2) Start small (single service/region); 3) Use traffic percentage to control impact; 4) Prepare rapid rollback; 5) Full team participation (not just ops); 6) Real-time monitoring of user impact. Secure management support.

questions.question_zh: 问题 75：游戏日的场景有多逼真？
questions.question_en: How realistic are Game Day scenarios?
questions.why_important: 逼真的场景提供有价值的学习机会

options.description_zh: 游戏日场景简单，不代表真实威胁
options.description_en: Game Day scenarios simple, not representing real threats

options.description_zh: 基于常见故障，但缺少复杂性或意外性
options.description_en: Based on common failures but lacking complexity or surprises

options.description_zh: 高度逼真：基于真实事件、多点故障、级联效应、时间压力、意外挑战
options.description_en: Highly realistic: based on real incidents, multi-point failures, cascading effects, time pressure, unexpected challenges

questions.aws_best_practice: 设计有效的Game Day场景：1) 基于历史重大事件；2) 包含多个并发故障；3) 测试跨团队协作；4) 引入意外元素（红队攻击）；5) 模拟沟通挑战；6) 测试决策制定。使用 AWS FIS 注入真实故障。
questions.why_important_en: Realistic scenarios provide valuable learning opportunities
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Design effective Game Day scenarios: 1) Based on historical major incidents; 2) Include multiple concurrent failures; 3) Test cross-team collaboration; 4) Introduce unexpected elements (red team attacks); 5) Simulate communication challenges; 6) Test decision making. Use AWS FIS to inject real failures.

questions.question_zh: 问题 76：游戏日的重现性如何？
questions.question_en: How reproducible are Game Days?
questions.why_important: 可重现的Game Days确保持续学习和改进

options.description_zh: Game Days是一次性活动，难以重复
options.description_en: Game Days are one-time events, difficult to repeat

options.description_zh: 有基本的脚本，但需要大量手动准备
options.description_en: Basic scripts exist but require significant manual preparation

options.description_zh: 完全可重现：自动化场景脚本、标准化评估、版本控制、定期执行
options.description_en: Fully reproducible: automated scenario scripts, standardized assessment, version control, regular execution

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立Game Day流程：1) 使用AWS FIS模板定义场景；2) 文档化准备清单和角色；3) 标准化评分标准；4) 自动化场景执行；5) 定期安排（季度）；6) 比较前后结果。存储在runbook库中。
questions.why_important_en: Reproducible Game Days ensure continuous learning and improvement
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish Game Day process: 1) Define scenarios using AWS FIS templates; 2) Document preparation checklists and roles; 3) Standardize scoring criteria; 4) Automate scenario execution; 5) Schedule regularly (quarterly); 6) Compare before/after results. Store in runbook library.

questions.question_zh: 问题 77：如何培育支持韧性的社区？
questions.question_en: How do you foster a community that supports resilience?
questions.why_important: 韧性社区促进知识共享和文化建设

options.description_zh: 无韧性社区，知识分散在团队中
options.description_en: No resilience community, knowledge scattered across teams

options.description_zh: 有非正式小组，但参与度低或影响力有限
options.description_en: Informal group exists but low participation or limited influence

options.description_zh: 活跃的韧性社区：定期聚会、知识分享、工具和实践、管理层支持、跨团队协作
options.description_en: Active resilience community: regular meetups, knowledge sharing, tools and practices, management support, cross-team collaboration

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立韧性社区实践：1) 组建CoE（Center of Excellence）；2) 定期聚会（月度tech talk）；3) Slack/Teams频道；4) 内部会议和工作坊；5) 建立导师计划；6) 表彰韧性贡献者。获得高级管理层赞助。
questions.why_important_en: Resilience communities promote knowledge sharing and culture building
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Build resilience community practices: 1) Form a Center of Excellence (CoE); 2) Regular meetups (monthly tech talks); 3) Slack/Teams channels; 4) Internal conferences and workshops; 5) Establish mentor programs; 6) Recognize resilience contributors. Secure senior management sponsorship.

questions.question_zh: 问题 78：如何定义韧性的角色和责任？
questions.question_en: How do you define roles and responsibilities for resilience?
questions.why_important: 明确的角色和责任确保韧性工作有人负责

options.description_zh: 韧性责任不明确，每个人都负责=无人负责
options.description_en: Resilience responsibility unclear, everyone responsible = no one responsible

options.description_zh: 有基本的角色定义，但职责边界模糊
options.description_en: Basic role definitions exist but responsibility boundaries unclear

options.description_zh: 清晰的角色框架：服务所有者、SRE、韧性工程师、安全团队，明确职责和协作模型
options.description_en: Clear role framework: service owners, SREs, resilience engineers, security team, clear responsibilities and collaboration model

questions.aws_best_practice: 定义韧性角色：1) 服务所有者：端到端责任；2) SRE：平台和工具；3) 韧性工程师：评估和咨询；4) 安全团队：威胁建模；5) 开发团队：功能韧性。使用RACI矩阵明确责任。采用'you build it, you run it'文化。
questions.why_important_en: Clear roles and responsibilities ensure someone is accountable for resilience work
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Define resilience roles: 1) Service owners: end-to-end responsibility; 2) SRE: platform and tools; 3) Resilience engineers: assessment and consulting; 4) Security team: threat modeling; 5) Dev teams: feature resilience. Use RACI matrix to clarify responsibilities. Adopt 'you build it, you run it' culture.

questions.question_zh: 问题 79：如何让团队了解韧性概念的最新情况？
questions.question_en: How do you keep teams up to date on resilience concepts?
questions.why_important: 持续学习确保团队跟上韧性最佳实践的发展

options.description_zh: 无系统的韧性培训或知识更新
options.description_en: No systematic resilience training or knowledge updates

options.description_zh: 有基本培训，但内容陈旧或更新频率低
options.description_en: Basic training exists but content outdated or infrequent updates

options.description_zh: 持续学习计划：定期培训、认证项目、会议参与、内部分享、行业跟踪
options.description_en: Continuous learning program: regular training, certification programs, conference participation, internal sharing, industry tracking

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立学习文化：1) 季度韧性培训（新工具、案例研究）；2) 支持AWS/行业认证（Solutions Architect、SRE）；3) 参加re:Invent和其他会议；4) 订阅AWS架构博客；5) 内部brown bag lunch；6) 建立学习预算。
questions.why_important_en: Continuous learning ensures teams keep up with evolving resilience best practices
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Build learning culture: 1) Quarterly resilience training (new tools, case studies); 2) Support AWS/industry certifications (Solutions Architect, SRE); 3) Attend re:Invent and other conferences; 4) Subscribe to AWS Architecture Blog; 5) Internal brown bag lunches; 6) Establish learning budgets.

questions.question_zh: 问题 80：如何根据独特情况定制韧性训练？
questions.question_en: How do you customize resilience training for unique circumstances?
questions.why_important: 定制化培训提高相关性和有效性

options.description_zh: 使用通用培训材料，不适应团队需求
options.description_en: Use generic training materials, not adapted to team needs

options.description_zh: 有一定定制，但不完全匹配团队环境
options.description_en: Some customization but not fully matching team environment

options.description_zh: 高度定制：基于实际系统、真实场景、团队角色、技术栈、历史事件
options.description_en: Highly customized: based on actual systems, real scenarios, team roles, tech stack, historical incidents

questions.aws_best_practice: 定制培训方法：1) 使用团队自己的架构图；2) 基于实际事件的案例研究；3) 针对技术栈的专门培训（如Lambda韧性）；4) 角色特定培训（开发vs运维）；5) 动手实验使用真实环境；6) 由团队成员分享经验。
questions.why_important_en: Customized training improves relevance and effectiveness
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Customized training approaches: 1) Use the team's own architecture diagrams; 2) Case studies based on real incidents; 3) Tech stack-specific training (e.g., Lambda resilience); 4) Role-specific training (dev vs. ops); 5) Hands-on labs using real environments; 6) Experience sharing by team members.
